description: Style NoteSimple and elegant, these sandals from catwalk epitomise minimalistic class. For those who are not fans of over the top embellishments in their ethnic ensembles, this pair is the right foot-style choice. Wear this with a simple light hued churidhar for maximum impact.Product DetailsGolden thong style straps doubling as a wide strap over the midfootNet strap with stone embellishmentsErgonomically designed footbed with mild cushioning for comfortTPU outsole with an upraised heel for better supportMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
